name: Napolencat
description:
What NapoleonCat Does

NapoleonCat is an all-in-one social media management tool that supports Google Business Profile in parallel with other social platforms. It is used by SMBs, agencies, and enterprises.

The NapoleonCat platform optimizes and streamlines business activities on Google Business Profile through the following strategies:

  • Reply to thousands of Google reviews in one place
  • Automated scheduling of Google Business Profile content
  • “Plug GBP into” your customer service workflows
Source: NapoleonCat

Key Features

  • Boost your local SEO with NapoleonCat by keeping your GBP (Google Business Profile) active with engaging content, discussions, and positive ratings.
    • You can schedule Google Business Profile posts using a calendar.
    • Post product updates, discounts, and special offers with CTA buttons, discount codes, T&Cs, and more.
    • Encourage your customers to leave positive reviews and respond to them promptly from one place.
  • Other features include:
    • Unified social inbox.
    • Automated reporting
    • Analytics and benchmark against competitors

Benefits of NapoleonCat

NapoleonCat’s primary benefit is the optimization of business activities on Google Business Profile (formerly Google My Business):

  • Automated scheduling of GBP content: Schedule and publish posts to your GBP profile, guaranteeing regular and timely updates.
  • Manage and respond to customer reviews and messages directly from the Social Inbox.
  • Reducing manual workload with automated moderation that automatically filters and responds to generic, repetitive messages.

Pricing

NapoleonCat offers three pricing models:

  • Standard: USD 32/month
  • One user
  • Three profiles  
  • Pro: USD 76/month
    • One user
    • Three profiles  
    • Additional features
  • Custom: USD 465/month
    • Unlimited team members
    • Unlimited profiles

Pros

✅Google Business Profile post scheduling

✅Automation

✅User-friendly interface

Cons

🚫Does not offer listings management

🚫Occasional technical issues
